name: account-switcher-01
title: Account Switcher
author: ilinxa
description: Popover-with-switchable-items primitive: active context label + chevron trigger that opens a list of contexts to switch to, plus an arbitrary footer slot for create/request affordances. Ships with controlled+uncontrolled open state from v0.1 (open / defaultOpen / onOpenChange), programmable ariaCurrent, collapse-to-icon trigger mode for slotting into icon-only sidebars, and F-cross-13 pre-emption on Popover.onOpenChange. Canonical occupant of rich-sidebar v0.2.0's topSlot.
